scripts.pack:release: pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-core pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-importer-markdown pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-sink-markdown pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-worker-shell pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-worker-code-agent pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-worker-local-llm pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-cli pack --dry-run
scripts.publish:release:dry-run: pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-core publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-importer-markdown publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-sink-markdown publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-worker-shell publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-worker-code-agent publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-worker-local-llm publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @caphtech/casegraph-cli publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks
